documentation.description:
===========================================================================

  This package is implementing the capability for the
  temperature sensor MC9808 using the I2C protocol.
  Using Fahrenheit.

===========================================================================

  Copyright 2025 (C) Holger Rodriguez

  SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause

simple_types.name: Fahrenheit
simple_types.code:
type Fahrenheit is delta Temperature_Divider_Fraction
range -429.0 .. 493.0 - Temperature_Divider_Fraction;

subprograms.name: Get_Ambient_Temperature
Get_Critical_Temperature
Get_Lower_Temperature
Get_Upper_Temperature
Set_Critical_Temperature
Set_Lower_Temperature
Set_Upper_Temperature
